headline: Zacks Earnings Trends Highlights: Dow, LyondellBasell and Methanex
summary: Q2 earnings estimates keep rising, led by Energy and Tech, with Dow, LyondellBasell and Methanex seeing major EPS estimate upgrades.

headline: Methanex Stock Soars 48% YTD: What's Powering the Rally?
summary: MEOH shares surged 47.7% year to date, riding higher methanol prices amid Middle East supply disruptions, while OCI assets support stronger earnings.
